name: Laksh — Reference Seed Images
description: Curated drone/UAV/aerial/defence reference seed images for the Laksh AI World Model dashboard (Reactor LingBot). Each image is intended as a SEED for an infinite navigable world generation, paired with a suggested LingBot prompt.
license_summary: All images sourced from Unsplash and used under the Unsplash License — free for commercial and non-commercial use, no permission or attribution required (attribution still provided here as good practice).

images.label: Coastal Recon — Top-Down
images.prompt_seed: A UAV holds a top-down hover over a tropical shoreline, surf breaking against pale sand as it scans the coastline for movement.

images.label: Desert Dunes — Aerial
images.prompt_seed: A reconnaissance drone glides low over endless rolling sand dunes at golden hour, tracking faint tracks across the open desert.

images.label: Desert Mesa — Overwatch
images.prompt_seed: A UAV patrols a wide arid valley of red rock buttes and mesas, maintaining overwatch across the open desert basin.

images.label: Coastal Fjord Ridge — Aerial
images.prompt_seed: A drone climbs along a steep coastal mountain ridge at sunrise, a narrow fjord glinting far below between jagged peaks.

images.label: Foggy Valley — Layered Ridges
images.prompt_seed: A UAV drifts through hazy light over layered forested ridgelines, scanning a mist-filled valley for thermal signatures.

images.label: Misty Cliff Corridor
images.prompt_seed: A drone follows a winding mountain road through a misty cliff corridor at dawn, tracing the route as fog rolls over the escarpment.

images.label: Above The Clouds — Alpine
images.prompt_seed: A high-altitude UAV cruises above a sea of clouds at dusk, snow peaks piercing the inversion layer along the horizon.

images.label: Night City — Surveillance
images.prompt_seed: A UAV loiters over a sprawling city grid at night, its sensor sweeping the glittering streets and skyline below.

images.label: Forest & Lake — Top-Down
images.prompt_seed: A drone scans straight down over the boundary where dense forest meets a turquoise lake, mapping the treeline edge.

images.label: Coastal City — Overhead
images.prompt_seed: A high UAV passes over a coastal city and its offshore developments, surveying the waterfront installations and marina below.

images.label: Night Sky — Open Horizon
images.prompt_seed: A UAV hovers under a vast star-filled sky over dark silhouetted hills, holding a quiet night watch on the horizon.

images.label: Airfield — Dusk Standby
images.prompt_seed: A drone taxis past an aircraft parked on a deserted airfield apron at dusk, the runway stretching into the low sun.
